title: codereview P4: router.c self-address check duplication with classify
description: The new IID check in lichen_router_route duplicates logic in lichen_router_classify and extract_iid. Should extract to static bool is_our_address() helper to avoid divergence. P4 readability. Discovered in /codereview pass 1 for project-LICHEN-8ey9.
close_reason: Fixed by adding is_our_address helper in router.c (pass 2 clean). Codereview P4 addressed.
